name: @aionis/runtime-evals
description: Git-authoritative bounded soak harness for Aionis Runtime releases

scripts.validate:fixture: node src/run-bounded-soak.mjs validate --lock config/v0.3.12-release-lock.json --authority fixtures/v0.3.12/authority-manifest.json --workload fixtures/v0.3.12/workload-manifest.json
scripts.run:pilot: node src/run-bounded-soak.mjs pilot --lock config/v0.3.12-release-lock.json --authority fixtures/v0.3.12/authority-manifest.json --workload fixtures/v0.3.12/workload-manifest.json --execute
scripts.run:soak: node src/run-bounded-soak.mjs soak --lock config/v0.3.12-release-lock.json --authority fixtures/v0.3.12/authority-manifest.json --workload fixtures/v0.3.12/workload-manifest.json --execute
